events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May was born on July 19, 1947, in Hampton Hill, Middlesex.

angles.name: Brian May's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the iconic Queen guitarist, astrophysicist, and all-round legend, Brian May!

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' charismatic frontman, Mick Jagger, was born on July 26, 1943, in Dartford, Kent.

angles.name: Mick Jagger's Birthday
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young today! Sending big birthday wishes to the one and only Mick Jagger of The Rolling Stones. Still rocking after all these decades.

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) officially launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the very first music video ever played.

angles.name: MTV Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember when MTV actually played music? Today marks 45 years since it launched, kicking off with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. The irony isn't lost on us.

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' in the UK on August 29, 1994, launching them into global stardom.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the game. Still sounds as fresh and vital as ever. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: Can you believe it's been 57 years since the mud, music, and magic of Woodstock? Three days of peace, love, and rock 'n' roll that defined a generation.

events.title: Tribute to Elvis Presley, 49 years on
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Elvis Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the King today. 49 years ago, the world lost Elvis Presley, but his music and legacy continue to inspire.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That iconic cover and timeless tracks still sound incredible. What's your go-to song from the album?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, was born on September 7, 1951, in Akron, Ohio.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! The Pretenders icon still proving that rock 'n' roll has no age limit.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, was born on September 21, 1972, in Manchester.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the rock 'n' roll swagger.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' album turns 55
events.blurb: John Lennon's seminal album 'Imagine' was released in the UK on October 8, 1971, featuring his enduring anthem of peace.

angles.name: Imagine Album Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. A timeless message that resonates just as powerfully today.

events.title: First iPod unveiled 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple introduced the revolutionary first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, promising '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember the click wheel? Today marks 25 years since Apple unveiled the original iPod, changing how we listen to music forever.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated as James Bond Day, marking the 1962 premiere of 'Dr. No', the very first Bond film.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Raise a martini (shaken, not stirred) to 007, 64 years since 'Dr. No' first hit screens.

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Legendary Beatles co-founder John Lennon was born on October 9, 1940.

angles.name: John Lennon Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message of peace continue to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British comedian and actor, John Cleese, was born on October 27, 1939, in Weston-super-Mare.

angles.name: John Cleese's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the comedy genius, John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true British institution.

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' turns 58
events.blurb: The Beatles released their self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: White Album Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-eight years ago, The Beatles unleashed their sprawling 'White Album'. A masterpiece of diverse sounds and a true landmark in music history.
